commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Ahicam. A man employed under Josias, (4 Kings xxii. 12.) and father of Godolias, who was also the protector of Jeremias, chap. xxxix. 14., and 4 Kings xxv. 22. (Calmet)

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: Jeremiah needed the help of Ahikam. How much more do we need that of God. - "Against the Pelagians 2.27"
